Gold Bang Pass: high-end, state of the art Bang Pass. The Gold Bang Pass allows its holder to do as he wishes with any woman, including women married to non-Gold Bang Pass holders. Silver Bang Pass: premium, high-grade Bang Pass. The Silver pass is worth a fortune and around 14% of pass holders are in the Silver category, a premium, highly coveted and rare grade. Governments seldom award the Silver pass to anyone, and, when they do, it is usually for a massive achievement, holding a ceremony for the award. Silver Pass holders are usually owners of large companies, royalty, presidents, media barons, judges, the best athletes and olympic medalists. The Silver Bang Pass comes with great renown, social and political power.

Bronze Bang Pass: standard, basic Bang Pass. The Bronze pass is worth a few million and around 85% of pass holders are in the Bronze category, a more common, achievable grade. Governments award the Bronze pass to athletes, renowned scientists and inventors, geniuses, humanitarian leaders, war heroes and award-winning artists. Businessmen, wealthy playboys, rich spoiled young men, and retired old men are some of Bronze Pass holders who have bought their pass.
